gxcr_ipsec_params_t Struct Reference
[IPsec API (gxcr/ipsec.h)]

Parameters used to set up an IPsec SA. More...


Data Fields

gxcr_token_info_t const * token_template
 Points to template for token.
int spi
 The Security Parameter Index.
int seqnum_size
 size of sequence number, in bits.
int seqnum_replay_window_size
 Size of the sequence number anti-replay window.
gxcr_cipher_t cipher
 Cipher algorithm for encryption, value implies key length.
gxcr_digest_t digest
 Digest algorithm for ICV.
bool explicit_iv
 True if there will be an explicit IV included in every packet, and not in the context record.
bool explicit_iv_from_prng
 True if the explicit IV for outbound packets is to be generated automatically from the engine's pseudo-random number generator.
bool inbound

bool hmac_mode
 Digest is HMAC mode.

Detailed Description

Parameters used to set up an IPsec SA.

These determine the exact operations to be performed on the packet, and the format of the internal context record. Once established by these parameters, the format of context record cannot change.

Examples:

mica/ipsec/app.c, and mica/queue/app.c.

Field Documentation

gxcr_token_info_t const* gxcr_ipsec_params_t::token_template

Points to template for token.

Examples:
mica/ipsec/app.c, and mica/queue/app.c.

int gxcr_ipsec_params_t::spi

The Security Parameter Index.

int gxcr_ipsec_params_t::seqnum_size

size of sequence number, in bits.

Must be 32, 48 or 64.

int gxcr_ipsec_params_t::seqnum_replay_window_size

Size of the sequence number anti-replay window.

Must be 32, 64, or 128.

gxcr_cipher_t gxcr_ipsec_params_t::cipher

Cipher algorithm for encryption, value implies key length.

gxcr_digest_t gxcr_ipsec_params_t::digest

Digest algorithm for ICV.

bool gxcr_ipsec_params_t::explicit_iv

True if there will be an explicit IV included in every packet, and not in the context record.

bool gxcr_ipsec_params_t::explicit_iv_from_prng

True if the explicit IV for outbound packets is to be generated automatically from the engine's pseudo-random number generator.

If false the IV must be provided by the user in the context record.

bool gxcr_ipsec_params_t::inbound

True if this is for inbound processing, false for outbound.

bool gxcr_ipsec_params_t::hmac_mode

Digest is HMAC mode.
